title: align_up with a power-of-two alignment
statement: From docs/basket/spec-allocator.md (alignment). Write exactly `fn align_up(x: usize, align: usize) -> usize` that rounds `x` up to the nearest multiple of `align` (a power of two, `align >= 1`); if `x` is already a multiple, return it unchanged. Default checked arithmetic; no unsafe. You may add a `requires(align >= 1usize)` clause. Define only the function (the harness supplies `main`).
